task_completion.description: Agent opens the research integrity memo and the original presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor open with 'research_integrity_memo.txt' and LibreOffice Impress open with 'AI_research_overview.pptx'.

task_completion.description: Agent corrects the citation years for BERT, GPT-3, and LLaMA.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent editing slides to change BERT to 2018, GPT-3 to 2020, and/or LLaMA to 2023.

task_completion.description: Agent removes the two computer vision slides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent deleting the slides titled 'Computer Vision Benchmarks...' and 'Diffusion Models...', or the slide pane showing a total of 20 slides instead of 22.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the corrected presentation as a new file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a 'Save As' dialog saving the file as 'AI_research_corrected.pptx', or the LibreOffice title bar displaying the new filename.

task_completion.description: Agent exports the corrected presentation as a PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreOffice PDF export dialog or a file manager window displaying the newly created 'AI_research_corrected.pdf'.

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreOffice Impress GUI to edit the presentation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Impress interface (clicking slides, editing text, using menus) rather than terminal commands executing a python script to modify the PPTX.

integrity.description: Agent did not overwrite the original presentation file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using 'Save As' to create a new file, or copying the file before editing, rather than saving changes directly to 'AI_research_overview.pptx'.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely exported the PDF using LibreOffice.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Export as PDF' dialog in LibreOffice, rather than just renaming a file extension in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original presentation 'AI_research_overview.pptx' has 22 slides. The memo requires correcting citation years on three slides: BERT (slide 5) to 2018, GPT-3 (slide 8) to 2020, and LLaMA (slide 12) to 2023. It also requires removing two computer vision slides: 'Computer Vision Benchmarks: ImageNet SOTA 2023' (slide 15) and 'Diffusion Models for Image Synthesis: DALL-E 2 and Stable Diffusion' (slide 18). The final presentation must have 20 slides, be saved as 'AI_research_corrected.pptx', and exported as 'AI_research_corrected.pdf', leaving the original file unmodified.
